## What this PR does

Describe the change in a sentence or two.

## Did any results change?

If numbers in tables or figures moved because of this change, say which ones and why. If nothing moved, say so.

## Checklist

- [ ] Scripts run top to bottom from a fresh R session
- [ ] No data files or patient level output in the diff
- [ ] Any counts in committed output respect the small cell rule
- [ ] Analysis plan updated if a decision changed
